goals.objective: Expose real runtime readiness for codex/opencode without starting workers.
acceptance_criteria: Readiness includes runtime, command, status, evidence and blocked reasons.
Unavailable runtime reports blocked readiness.
Mock and unknown runtimes cannot be production-certified.
Readiness checks start no workers.

goals.objective: Add an opt-in real runtime integration spine smoke.
acceptance_criteria: Smoke is skipped unless RUN_REAL_RUNTIME_SMOKE=1.
REAL_RUNTIME selects codex or opencode.
Smoke imports a low-risk integration event and prepares leases with explicit runtime.
Planning starts no workers.

goals.objective: Run maker and checker through existing worker pool with real runtime evidence.
acceptance_criteria: Worker starts only through existing scheduler.
Maker stdout/stderr, gates, checkpoints and manifests are persisted.
Checker waits for maker evidence.
Checker verdict links to source work item and loop.

goals.objective: Certify a real runtime proof run as production when all required evidence exists.
acceptance_criteria: Mock proof remains demo.
Real runtime proof reports proof_class production.
production_missing is empty for certified run.
Incomplete real runtime proof reports exact missing criteria.

goals.objective: Close the real runtime integration loop into eval, reflection and optional memory candidate.
acceptance_criteria: Close-loop creates eval and reflection for real runtime evidence.
Reusable lesson creates memory candidate only.
Regression creates repair work item.
No durable memory promotion occurs automatically.

goals.objective: Show production runtime certification state in Mission Control.
acceptance_criteria: Dashboard distinguishes mock demo from production runtime proof.
Dashboard shows requested runtime, effective runtime and production_missing reasons.
Dashboard shows next safe action.
Dashboard renders empty certification state without crashing.

goals.objective: Run one bounded low-risk production runtime certification and capture evidence.
acceptance_criteria: Opt-in real runtime smoke completes with evidence ids.
Mission Control shows production certification.
No auto-merge, deploy or automatic memory promotion occurs.
OpenSpec, server, dashboard, type-check, build and diff gates pass.
